title.en: The second prisoner Ye Tian chose was Lord Chen...

content.en:
The second prisoner Ye Tian chose was Lord Chenming.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the prison of Lord Chenming, fought with Lord Chenming, and soon inflicted heavy damage on Lord Chenming, and soon after, he killed Lord Chenming.

On Lord Chenming's body, Ye Tian did not find any treasures.

Not all prisoners have treasures on them, and Lord Chenming does not have such ~ treasures on them

In the following days, Ye Tian killed one prisoner after another, and one after another stone tablets collapsed, representing the fall of the prisoners inside.

One of these prisoners probably has a very good treasure on his body, so that Ye Tian's net worth is increasing, but the prisoners at the level of the Immortal Realm Lord are about a thousand, and the Eternal Kui Treasure that Ye Tian can really obtain is only about three hundred.

But even so, his net worth is probably enough to surpass the six presidents.

It's a pity that he can't beat those Legendary Realm Lord prisoners, otherwise the gain will be even greater.

After a long time, the Immortal Realm Lord had fallen to two hundred.

If the other Immortal Realm Lords knew that Ye Tian had killed two hundred Immortal Realm Lord prisoners, they would definitely not be in disbelief.

The Yuanhai space-time territory was only about a hundred Immortal Realm Lords, but Ye Tian had killed two hundred Immortal Realm prisoners here, what an astonishing number.

But it can also be seen from here that the power of Moshan is too powerful, and it has imprisoned so many Immortal Realm Lords and Legendary Realm Lords, far beyond the space-time territory.

Moshan, Jingxu, there is really no legend, these places definitely do not belong to the territory of time and space, but where exactly they belong, Ye Tian really doesn't know.

Of course, he won't be looking for this at the moment, he just wants to get more resources and opportunities.

Another prison.

As usual, Ye Tian was ready to kill the Immortal Realm prisoner here, this prisoner was called the Raincoat Lord, a female lord with an appearance similar to that of the human race.

Soon, Ye Tian fought with the other party, and showed all his strength, easily hitting her hard.

Just when Ye Tian was about to kill the other party, the raincoat lord actually begged for mercy.

"Don't kill me!"

The raincoat lord begged for mercy.

This is the first time Ye Tian has seen the prisoners begging for mercy, those prisoners before were all mentally abnormal, and they couldn't communicate at all, and the raincoat had fought with him many times before, and he had never said much, but now he begged for mercy.

Suddenly, Ye Tian became interested and stopped fighting.

"Among all the prisoners in Moshan Prison, you are the only one who begged for mercy. Ye Tiandao.

Raincoat Lord: I don't want to die, and I can feel that you have a heart this time, so I can only beg for mercy. As long as you don't, I will promise you any conditions. "

After a moment of silence, I made a decision in my heart.

"I ask you something, and if you answer truthfully, I will not kill you. "

"Good!"

The raincoat lord hurriedly replied.

Ye Tian asked, "I want to know the origin of Moshan." "

"I'll tell you!" the raincoat lord told the origin of Moshan one by one.

In the mouth of the raincoat, Ye Tian learned what kind of power Moshan was.

Moshan is a very ancient force, and the raincoat lord doesn't know the current situation of Moshan, she only tells Moshan what she knows.

Moshan has three Legendary Realm Lords, many Legendary Realm Lords, and as for the Immortal Realm Lords, there are too many, if you want to join a force like Moshan, you have to enter the Eternal Realm or the Eight Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, otherwise you are not eligible to join Moshan.

And Moshan is resolute for traitors, once he joins Moshan, he must not join other forces, otherwise he will inevitably be hunted down by Moshan, and even once an incomparably powerful legendary realm lord, second only to the existence of the legendary realm lord, betrayed Moshan, and was killed by the legendary realm lord of Moshan.

As Ye Tian guessed, Moshan is not the power of the space-time territory, and the raincoat lord does not know what space-time territory, whether it is her, or Moshan, they all come from another place-the Infinite Sea.

The Infinite Sea is the heaven and earth where Moshan is located, and Moshan is one of the forces of the Immeasurable Sea, there are still many forces comparable to Moshan, and there are even more powerful forces than Moshan.

And in the Infinite Sea, the Legendary Realm Lord is the real top existence, the Legendary Realm Lord cannot be called the top combat power, but it is still a hegemon, and the Immortal Realm Lord can only be called invincible in a small area.

"Do you know Jingxu?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Jingxu?" The raincoat lord thought about it for a moment and nodded: "I've heard that Jingxu's strength is much weaker than Moshan's, it's not a grade, Jingxu shouldn't have a Legendary Realm Lord, but there is a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, so it's a little famous in the Infinite Sea, but it's not very famous." "

"Sure enough, Jingxu and Moshan both belong to the same place, and it should have been a great war that broke out in the Infinite Sea, causing the two places of Jingxu and Moshan to directly cross time and space, come here, and become the ruins here. Ye Tian said darkly.

"That's really no legend tower, have you heard of it?" Ye Tian asked.

"Heard!"

The raincoat lord immediately replied: "The True Legendless Tower is the iconic assessment tower of the Infinite Sea True Immortal Land, the True Immortal Land is the top force above Moshan, and the Legendary Realm Lords alone have more than double digits, which is far from comparable to Moshan." "

...........

"Now that this place is no longer in the Infinite Sea, do you know how to go to the Infinite Sea?" Ye Tian asked again.

He definitely wanted to go to the higher heavens in the future, so the Infinite Sea was definitely a very good choice.

"Isn't it really in the Infinite Sea, I felt the horror of the prison at the beginning, thinking that Moshan was destroyed by the enemy, but I didn't wait for the arrival of the enemy of Moshan, if I hadn't performed a secret technique to keep my will and heart unaffected, otherwise it would be difficult to get through this endless loneliness, maybe I would have gone crazy. As for how to get back to the Infinite Sea, I really don't know. If I really leave the Immeasurable Sea here, then I will enter the Void Zone, and I will not be able to locate the Immeasurable Sea. The raincoat lord shook his head.

Ye Tian didn't really expect the raincoat lord to guide him to the Infinite Sea, just tried to ask, now that the raincoat lord couldn't help, he also broke off this idea, maybe when he became stronger, there was hope to find the Infinite Sea.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the raincoat lord kept communicating and learned a lot of secrets.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai left the prison of the raincoat lord, and he also kept his promise and did not kill the raincoat lord.

However, he will not release the raincoat lord either, and in fact he can't.

Next, Ye Tian continued to kill other prisoners, but on this day, he encountered a real opponent, the other party was definitely a Gou Bi, obviously his strength was terrifying, but he couldn't hide it, if Ye Tian didn't want to kill him, he really couldn't force out his real strength eight. _
